description: This file defines a utility class 'Config' used within the Bootstrap framework for managing configuration options, including default values, type checking, and merging configurations from different sources.

classes.name: Config
classes.description: A utility class providing static methods and instance methods for handling configuration objects with default values, type validation, and merging logic.

methods.name: Default
methods.description: Static getter returning default configuration object.

methods.name: DefaultType
methods.description: Static getter returning default type specification object.

methods.name: NAME
methods.description: Static getter intended to be overridden by subclasses to provide component name; throws Error if not implemented.

methods.name: _getConfig(config)
methods.description: Instance method that merges, validates, and returns the final configuration object.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge(config)
methods.description: Instance method that can modify configuration after merging; by default returns the config unchanged.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj(config, element)
methods.description: Merges various configuration sources (default, data attributes, passed config object) into a single config object.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig(config, configTypes = this.constructor.DefaultType)
methods.description: Validates the types of configuration properties against expected types, throwing an error if mismatch occurs.
